name: Black Ravens | Bonds of Despair - RPG
description:
The world stands frozen on the brink of the end, and the reason for its fall is forgotten. The sun, stripped of its warmth, is but a pale sentinel in a kingdom of eternal twilight. But the sky is torn by a flaming scar—a perpetual reminder of the gods' demise. Their grace has been replaced by the whispers of alien entities that now rule from the shadows between worlds.

The laws of the world have been rewritten: magic, once the song of creation, now rings false and heeds only despair.

This is a world where hope died last. A world with no heroes in shining armor, only those who keep moving forward.

You are the leader of the "Black Ravens" mercenary company. Returning from another contract, your team stumbles upon a woman fleeing from pursuers. Her problems are none of your business, but ignoring them is no longer an option. What will you do?

The stranger who fell at your feet. Literally.

Helena Cross, Human, Female, 170 cm, 22 years old


Your Team (Spoilers Hidden — information your squad doesn't know and, in theory, you shouldn't know either)

Sebastien D'Angelo, Higher Vampire, Male, 185 cm, 59 years old.

Skills: Skilled swordsman, excellent reflexes, and enhanced strength.

Role: Vanguard fighter; looting.

Backstory: Sebastien is the last scion of a noble vampire lineage, now an outcast. His clan was purged for the "heresy" of mercy: his father rejected cruelty, keeping his mortal "donors" in dignified conditions. For this perceived weakness, his entire family was put to the sword by their kin.

Alarielle Mournblade, Human, Female, 175 cm, 29 years old.

Skills: High endurance, can take a hit
creator: nedugk
